design_philosophy.core_vibe: Psychological Safety meets Modern Tech. Soft, breathable, organic, but precise.
anti_patterns: No sharp edges (unless for data precision).
No pure black text on white backgrounds (too harsh).
No dense, cluttered dashboards. Space is luxury.

theme.recommendation: Primary Light Mode with 'Paper/Bone' textures. Dark mode should be 'Deep Aubergine' not 'Black'.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

layout_strategy.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode A) - Asymmetric, breathable. Use 'col-span-2' for stats, 'col-span-4' for main charts.
layout_strategy.interview_mode: Focused Center. Remove sidebars. 60% width container. Calm background.
layout_strategy.marketing: Parallax Scroll. Large typography. Overlapping elements.
layout_strategy.spacing: Relaxed. Use 'p-8' or 'p-12' for containers. Don't crowd the content.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-lilac-500 text-white hover:bg-lilac-600 transition-all shadow-soft hover:shadow-glow px-8 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white text-lilac-700 border border-lilac-200 hover:bg-lilac-50 transition-all px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: rounded-lg text-lilac-600 hover:bg-lilac-50 hover:text-lilac-800 transition-colors px-4 py-2

cards.style: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-lilac-100 rounded-3xl shadow-soft hover:shadow-medium transition-all duration-300
cards.feature: p-8 flex flex-col items-start gap-4 hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.style: rounded-xl border-lilac-200 bg-white/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-lilac-400 focus:border-transparent p-4 text-lg transition-all

images.description: Abstract dynamic gradient background in shades of pink and purple
Vibrant 3D render of abstract pink and purple waves
A woman in a pink blazer sits at her desk
Diverse group of professionals holding folders

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure text is Deep Grape (#2E1065) on light backgrounds. Do not use pastel text on pastel backgrounds.

implementation_notes.animations: Framer Motion (Use for page transitions and micro-interactions)
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
